title: ajax hexangularis
intro: Ajax hexangularis, also known as the African bird's eye chili, is a species of hot pepper native to West and Central Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Ajax hexangularis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or as a tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a variety of ways.
